title: CONTRIBUTING: update vendoring instructions
body:
:wave: skopeo maintainers!

This updates the contribution instructions to use go modules vendoring instead of `vndr`.

I hope I interpreted the intention correctly as I stumbled into this while trying to open my first PR (trying to do that according to documentation!).

comments.body: Thanks @mtrmac, all good points. I hope the text is OK now!

> Could you squash your commits.

Done
